chapter_title.en: The Obligation of the jumu’ah Prayer, Its Virtue, Who is Exempt From it, and the Prayer and Sermon Therein

text: 1260 - وَقَالَ رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ: «مَنْ أَتَى اَلْجُمُعَةَ إِيمَاناً وَ اِحْتِسَاباً اِسْتَأْنَفَ اَلْعَمَلَ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.1260 - The Messenger of Allah (sw) said:
"Whoever attends the Jumu’ah prayer with faith and seeking the reward (from Allah (swt)), his deeds will be renewed”.
